description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Test that runs on push to the master branch, on pull requests, and on a scheduled cron job. The workflow has two jobs: check and gpu. The check job runs on a matrix of operating systems (ubuntu-18.04, macos-latest, windows-latest) and R versions (release, 3.6), checking out the code, setting up R, installing dependencies, building and testing a package called lantern, and running tests. The gpu job runs on a self-hosted Linux environment with a matrix of CUDA versions, building a Docker image, and running checks with the Docker image.
